title: Specificity: who wins?
description: When two rules match, specificity decides.

questions.prompt: Which selector has the HIGHEST specificity?
questions.explanation: IDs beat classes and elements. #title wins.

questions.prompt:
Which rule wins on

?
Make the button red WITHOUT changing the HTML or using !important. Add ONE selector.

questions.explanation: Inline style beats all normal rules; !important beats inline.

questions.code:
p.a { color: red; }
p { color: blue !important; }
questions.explanation: !important overrides specificity — even a low-specificity rule wins.

options: Avoided except for utility overrides and 3rd-party CSS
Placed at the top of every file
questions.explanation: !important disables normal cascade — use sparingly, or you'll fight yourself later.
IDs → 1, classes → 2, elements → 0. Format (id, class, element).
